name: Lemon Meringue Pie (Fruit Sweet)
recipeIngredient: -2/3 cups if you like it sweet
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Combine 1/2 cup water and cornstarch in a saucepan. Add remaining water and Fruit Sweet. Stirring constantly over medium heat, cook until mixture thickens and boils. Boil for 1 minute. Remove from heat. Stir half of the mixture into egg yolks, then blend this back into the hot mixture. Stir and cook for 2 more minutes. Remove from heat and stir in butter, lemon juice, and peel. Pour into crust.
Meringue: Beat whites and cream of tartar until fluffy. Slowly add Fruit Sweet and continue beating until stiff and glossy. Beat in vanilla. Heap onto hot filling, sealing meringue to edge of crust. Bake 5-7 minutes, until golden.
